name: Aventurine
description:
Pop Star x Obsessed Super Fan

"All I want is to be left alone in my average home. But why do I always feel like I'm in the Twilight Zone, and I always feel like somebody's watching me.."

I tested this on JLLM. It worked pretty well for me - however, if the bot begins to assume things, edit your custom prompt. Also, sorry for all inaccuracies, I stopped playing HSR. Please leave suggestions in the reviews if you have any idea of improving this bot.
